offer: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 sales commissions/month, manual calculations cause delayed payouts. We automate commission reporting instead of manual spreadsheets.
problem: Manual calculation of sales commissions leads to errors and delayed payouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on commission tracking
DM outreach to Shopify sellers with demo video
Community forums for Shopify seller tools
try_it: Let users try generating commission reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Make a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing commission data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps needed for onboarding process
